name_cn:
Genuine Grade
Patent Leather CELIN.E Triomphe Kelly Handbag 👜
TEEN NINO Handbag, full of high-class feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram colorway, etc... all exude incomparable high-class feel ❤️ Kelly classic silhouette lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all showing aesthetic charm 🫶🏻
Handle length 7.5cm, 1 detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 45cm, max length 54cm
Size: 20 X 13 X 8cm
No.: 118113
